page_content:
VI. RIGHT TO FILE A COMPLAINT

A. Students have the right to ﬁle a complaint with the U.S. Department of Education concerning alleged failures by UMD to comply with the requirements of FERPA. The name and address of the ofﬁce that administers FERPA is:

Family Policy Compliance Ofﬁce U.S. Department of Education 400 Independence Avenue, S.W. Washington, D.C. 20202
